instruction: 请将以下自然语言问题转化为 Neo4j Cypher 查询语句。
input: 谁是论文《GRAVER: Generative Graph Vocabularies for Robust Graph Foundation Models Fine-tuning》的所有作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'GRAVER: Generative Graph Vocabularies for Robust Graph Foundation Models Fine-tuning'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN a.name

input: 统计论文《GRAVER: Generative Graph Vocabularies for Robust Graph Foundation Models Fine-tuning》一共有多少位署名作者？
output: MATCH (p:Paper {title: 'GRAVER: Generative Graph Vocabularies for Robust Graph Foundation Models Fine-tuning'})-[:AUTHORED_BY]->(a:Author) RETURN count(a) AS AuthorCount
